answer: LinkedIn does not offer a public pricing tier, as the Advertising API is a free-to-access program for qualified developers, provided they meet specific use case requirements [1][2][3]. All applications begin in the Development tier, which allows unlimited read access and the ability to edit up to five ad accounts [1][3][4]. To scale beyond these limits, you must build your application and subsequently apply for the Standard tier via a support ticket on the Developer Support Portal [1][3][5]. There is no self-serve, paid subscription model for immediate API access; approval is subject to manual review [2][3].
